name: vercel
description: Vercel API — projects, deployments, build logs, runtime logs

operations.name: setup
operations.description: Store Vercel access token (one-time setup). Optionally set a default team ID.

default_team_id.description: Default team ID or slug (e.g. 'team_abc123' or 'my-team'). Optional — saves you typing it every time.

operations.name: list_teams
operations.description: List all teams the authenticated user belongs to

operations.name: list_projects
operations.description: List Vercel projects for a team or personal account

team_id.description: Team ID or slug. Omit to use default team or personal account.

operations.name: get_project
operations.description: Get detailed info about a specific project (framework, domains, latest deployment)

team_id.description: Team ID or slug. Omit to use default.
Team ID or slug. Omit to use default.

operations.name: get_deployment
operations.description: Get detailed info about a specific deployment

team_id.description: Team ID or slug. Omit to use default.

operations.name: get_build_logs
operations.description: Get build logs for a deployment — useful for diagnosing failed builds

team_id.description: Team ID or slug. Omit to use default.

operations.name: get_runtime_logs
operations.description: Get runtime/function logs for a project. Filter by level, environment, time range, status code, or search query.

team_id.description: Team ID or slug. Omit to use default.

deployment_id.description: Filter to a specific deployment ID

level.description: Comma-separated log levels: error, warning, info, fatal

since.description: Start time — ISO timestamp or relative like '1h', '30m', '7d' (default: 24h ago)

until.description: End time — ISO timestamp or relative like 'now'
